title: The Eldritch Pack
description: A pack with a horror focus that also contains plenty of other additions so that everyone can enjoy. Includes Magic and Create
body:
# **Welcome to The Eldritch SMP Modpack!**

This modpack is a horror centric kitchensink. It has a bit of everything, but is especially meant for our custom SMP server. Check out our Discord for access!
## What is included
- Create, for a balanced technology mod that doesnt trvialize the monsters
- lots of types of magic
- more bosses
- monsters
- Shaders!
- lots of optimizations
- Valkyrien Skies
- New biomes
- New Dimensions
- Overhauled Nether and End
- New food
- ### And more!
